manifest.name: Inkporter

name: Inkporter

releases.author: AmadeussSystem
releases.description:
This release focuses heavily on underlying performance and system stability. We completely rebuilt how Inkporter manages the neural backend, moving it from a basic experimental setup to a much faster, fully persistent local API.

## Major Features
- Interactive Server Dashboard: A new control panel has been added directly to the plugin settings. You can now monitor the background API server in real-time, with explicit controls to Start, Stop, or Restart the engine without having to restart Obsidian itself.
- Vectorized Processing (Massive Speedup): We rewrote the core image extraction algorithm. Instead of analyzing image tiles one at a time, the neural network now processes them in parallel batches. This change alone has reduced the time it takes to process an image from roughly 7 seconds down to less than 2 seconds on average.
Native OS Deployment: The Python engine installation is no longer handled invisibly inside the Obsidian UI. When you click Install, it now opens a native, dedicated terminal window so you can properly track download progress and read any potential system errors if they occur.
## System Management
- Hardware Auto-Detection: The installer will now automatically run a background check for NVIDIA graphics drivers. If none are found, the installer automatically falls back to a lightweight, CPU-optimized version of PyTorch, preventing you from unnecessarily downloading 2.5GB of incompatible data.
- Global Dependency Linking: The installer now creates your virtual environment using the --system-site-packages flag. If you already have Python environments with PyTorch installed globally on your machine, Inkporter will recognize and reuse them instead of redownloading everything from scratch.
- Memory Management: Added a global cleanup listener. The background server process is now tightly integrated with Obsidian's lifecycle, meaning the Python engine will safely self-terminate anytime you close the app, preventing orphaned processes from lingering in your computer's background memory.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AmadeussSystem/Inkporter/compare/2.0.0...3.0.0
